description.content: Lists projects with pagination and sorting support.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Creates a new project with the specified name.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Gets a project by its ID.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Updates a project's name or description.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Deletes a project and its associated configuration.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Fetches a list of models for a project.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Associates an existing model with a project.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Removes a model from a project.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Fetches a list of collaborators for a project.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Adds a new collaborator to a project.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Removes a collaborator from a project.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Fetches a list of secrets for a project.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Creates a new secret for a project.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Fetches a secret for a project (does not return the value).
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Updates the value of a secret for a project.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Deletes a secret from a project.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Fetches a list of tags for a project.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Adds a tag to a project.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Removes a tag from a project by name.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Lists project activity events with filtering and pagination options.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

Projects are the top-level organizing container in Paperspace — they own
deployments, models, secrets, tags, activity feeds, and collaborator lists.
Authenticate with a team-scoped API key as `Authorization: Bearer
$API_TOKEN`.
